page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Staden io_lib is a library of file reading and writing code e.g. for SAM/BAM/CRAM.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Staden io_lib is a library of file reading and writing code e.g. for SAM/BAM/CRAM
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A library of file reading and writing code to provide a general purpose trace file (and Experiment File) reading interface.
